hooks.command: F=.claude/.turn-counter; N=$(cat "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); N=$((N+1)); echo "$N" > "$F"; if [ "$N" -eq 25 ]; then printf '%s' '{"systemMessage":"⚠ 25 turns reached on this session — consider /clear (with handoff summary) or /compact <focus> before context bloats (CLAUDE.md §11)","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Turn count reached 25 in this session. Per CLAUDE.md §11 advise the user to run /clear (with handoff summary) or /compact (with focus) before continuing."}}'; fi
